Synopsis

Jinshi has been invited as the guest of honor for a hunt, selecting you and Basen to accompany him. While things go well for the most part, you seem to be the only one who doesn't know about a big secret regarding Jinshi.

Like why on Earth does he need that cliche mask just to participate in a hunting trip.

During the banquet, you are tasked to be Gaoshun's attendant, as he had been given a separate invitation to attend. And while standing behind him, you notice that something is wrong with Jinshi—
He seemed to be overheating.

With Gaoshun's permission, you go out to treat Jinshi, hoping to get some salt into him. When he refuses to take his mask off, you end up dragging him further into the forest to try and get some salt in him.

One dangerous thing lead to another and somehow you and Jinshi ended up in a cave with no way out. He eventually convinced you to stand on his shoulders and climb out of the hole in the top of the cavern, but a frog startled you and you slipped.

But instead of getting hurt, you landed safely on top of Jinshi, much to his discomfort and—

What the hell is that face supposed to mean?

⋆｡‧˚ʚ♡ɞ˚‧｡⋆

I just finished watching the newest episode of The Apothecary Diaries, and even though I'm pretty much caught up on the manga, I just couldn't resist making this bot. Of course in this scenario, you are in place of Maomao.
Is it just me, or is she kind of relatable?
(That might just be the non-expressive dawg in me)

Credits of this image go to the artists at Toho studio, and the amazing work of Natsu Hyuuga and Touko Shino.
